headline: Gloo Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Gloo (NASDAQ:GLOO) reported fiscal fourth-quarter 2025 results that management said exceeded its guidance and capped what it described as a strong first year as a public company, while also outlining an acquisition plan and a path toward Adjusted EBITDA profitability in fiscal 2026. summary: Workday (WDAY) reached $117.86 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -1.72% change compared to its last close.

headline: Gloo to Acquire Enterprisemarketdesk (EMD), a Workday Services Partner Built for Nonprofit and Mid-Market Organizations
summary: BOULDER, Colo., April 14, 2026--Gloo (Nasdaq: GLOO), a leading technology platform for the faith and flourishing ecosystem, today announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire EMD, an established Workday Services Partner that provides consulting, implementation and support services to nonprofit, small and mid-market organizations. The acquisition will add a broad set of AI-enabled Workday services and expertise to the Gloo platform, further strengthening the company’s port

headline: Outdated Technology Increases Risk and Impedes Mission Readiness for Federal Finance Teams, Workday Government Research Shows
summary: Workday Government, a wholly owned subsidiary of Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, finance, and agents, today announced new research showing outdated financial management systems are increasing risk and impeding mission readiness for federal finance teams, with eight in ten survey respondents saying they don't have the visibility needed to effectively manage risk.

headline: HubSpot and Workday Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the morning session after investors moved to buy the dip in high-quality SaaS names that had become significantly oversold amid a fragile market rebound driven by cautious optimism surrounding U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks.
